target_device: Qualcomm Adreno730v3 (SM8475) with a7xx-a8xx recovery scope
notes: No Mesa/Rusticl readiness claim without: build log + clinfo + kernel parity
All patches are research-only until proven on device
Custom driver stack is the intended production route; vendor OpenCL is evidence-only and not authoritative
Mesa 26.2+ already exposes freedreno-kmds=kgsl upstream; semantic patch reconstruction is required
